businessJourney.goal: A new business goes from sign-up to accepting live bookings.
steps: Business owner submits registration form with business name, email, and plan
Platform acknowledges registration and begins provisioning
Owner receives welcome email with setup link
Owner configures business hours
Owner adds services with duration and price
Owner adds staff members
Booking page is live and accepting customer appointments
businessJourney.successOutcome: First customer appointment can be booked within 30 minutes of sign-up

implementation.consistency: Eventually consistent — provisioning steps are independent subscribers

businessJourney.goal: A customer books an appointment with a business.
steps: Customer visits the tenant's booking page
Customer selects a service
Customer selects a staff member (or any available)
Customer chooses an available date and time slot
Customer enters contact details
Customer completes payment if required
Customer receives confirmation with full appointment details
businessJourney.successOutcome: Confirmed appointment in under 2 minutes, confirmation received within 30 seconds

implementation.consistency: Synchronous saga with compensation — atomic success or failure

businessJourney.goal: A customer cancels a confirmed appointment within the allowed window.
steps: Customer requests cancellation of their appointment
System validates cancellation is within policy window
Customer receives cancellation confirmation
Refund is processed if applicable
Staff member is notified of the cancellation
Slot becomes available for new bookings
businessJourney.successOutcome: Slot re-opened within 10 seconds; customer notified within 30 seconds; refund initiated within 60 seconds

implementation.failureHandling: Refund failure routes to DLQ for manual ops review; does not block slot release

businessJourney.goal: A customer moves their appointment to a different time.
steps: Customer requests a new time for their existing appointment
Customer selects a new available slot
System confirms availability of the new slot
Original slot is released
New slot is confirmed
Customer receives rescheduling confirmation
businessJourney.successOutcome: Rescheduled appointment confirmed; original slot freed for new bookings

implementation.architecture: Sequential: new slot saga → if successful, cancel old slot
implementation.consistency: Atomic — original booking unchanged if new slot unavailable

businessJourney.goal: A tenant admin checks today's performance at the start of the business day.
steps: Admin opens the dashboard
Admin views today's confirmed bookings and upcoming schedule
Admin checks cancellation rate and revenue
Admin identifies peak hours for staffing decisions
Admin acts on any alerts (e.g. high cancellation rate)
businessJourney.successOutcome: Full operational picture available in under 1 second, updated within 5 seconds of each booking event

businessJourney.goal: Platform operator resolves a stuck event in the dead letter queue.
steps: Operator receives Grafana alert: DLQ depth > 0
Operator opens Ops console and inspects failed event payload
Operator identifies failure reason (e.g. malformed payload, downstream timeout)
Operator corrects the payload or acknowledges the root cause
Operator re-queues the event for reprocessing
Operator confirms the event is processed successfully
businessJourney.successOutcome: Failed event resolved within SLA (4 hours); audit trail preserved

businessJourney.goal: A departing tenant exports their data and is cleanly offboarded.
steps: Tenant admin requests a full data export
Platform generates structured archive of all tenant data
Signed download link sent to verified owner email
Tenant downloads their data
After 30-day window, operator initiates deprovisioning
Data retained for 90 days, then permanently deleted
businessJourney.successOutcome: Tenant departs with full data portability; platform has no residual data after retention period

implementation.architecture: Ops Service scoped export + status machine deprovisioning
implementation.consistency: Synchronous export generation; async deprovisioning notifications
